'''√ch-k-zh''' ('''kachakazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:qualm|qualm]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-k-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qualm|qualm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ch-k-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kachakazh
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thichakazh || jichakazh || shichakazh || kichakazh
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuchakazh || jujuchakazh || shushuchakazh || kukuchakazh
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuchakazh || juchakazh || shuchakazh || kuchakazh
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuchakazh || juchakazh || shuchakazh || kuchakazh
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thechakazh || jechakazh || shechakazh || kechakazh
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothochakazh || jojochakazh || shoshochakazh || kokochakazh
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thochakazh || jochakazh || shochakazh || kochakazh
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thochakazh || jochakazh || shochakazh || kochakazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || chakazh || chakazh || chakazh || chakazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || chakazh || chakazh || chakazh || chakazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || chakazh || chakazh || chakazh || chakazh
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || chakazh || chakazh || chakazh || chakazh
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæchakazh || jæchakazh || shæchakazh || kæchakazh
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathachakazh || jajachakazh || shashachakazh || kakachakazh
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thachakazh || jachakazh || shachakazh || kachakazh
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thachakazh || jachakazh || shachakazh || kachakazh
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shachakazh
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshachakazh
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishachakazh
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shachakazhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshachakazhnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishachakazhnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shachakazhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshachakazhnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishachakazhshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shachakazhro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshachakazhnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishachakazhro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shachakazhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshachakazhnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishachakazhmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shachakazhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshachakazhnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishachakazhsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shachakazhng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshachakazhnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishachakazhng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shachakazhya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshachakazhnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishachakazhya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shachakazhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshachakazhnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishachakazhyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shachakazhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshachakazhnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishachakazhnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shachakazhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshachakazhnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishachakazhnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shachakazhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshachakazhnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishachakazhnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shachakazhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshachakazhnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishachakazhshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shachakazhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshachakazhnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishachakazhshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shachakazhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshachakazhnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishachakazhshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shachakazhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshachakazhnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishachakazhronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shachakazhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshachakazhnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishachakazhroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shachakazhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshachakazhnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishachakazhromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shachakazhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshachakazhnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishachakazhmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shachakazhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshachakazhnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishachakazhmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shachakazhmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshachakazhnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishachakazhmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
